overall.description: A third-person perspective from a narrative video game showing three characters—an adult with a crossbow, a child, and a woman—walking through a coastal village festival. They traverse a dirt path past a large tree decorated with red ribbons, crowds of villagers, and outdoor crafting stations under bright summer sunlight with kites flying overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path with two companions toward a distant festival gathering

entered.detail: large tree wrapped in red ribbons and flowers, serving as the festival centerpiece
dark wooden building with red and white flags on the right side of the path
circular wooden arch decorated with flowers and red fabric
rocky cliff face with the sea visible beyond

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny coastal trail with wildflowers lining the path. The three characters walk forward toward a festival area, with a large decorated tree visible in the distance and a wooden longhouse on the right. The scene is open and exposed with clear skies.

events.description: entering dense crowd of villagers gathered in a circle around the decorated tree

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowd gathered around the base of the large decorated tree

notable_agents.action: villagers sitting in a circle around the base of the decorated tree

segments.scene_description: The group enters a dense crowd gathered around the decorated tree. Villagers sit in circles on the ground near the tree base while the three characters weave through the gathering. The wooden longhouse remains visible on the right as they progress.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal area with kites flying

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal yellow kites flying against the blue sky
passing the decorated tree and entering the open crafting area

agents.ego_description: walking past the tree while looking up at the kites flying overhead

entered.detail: multiple yellow diamond-shaped kites flying high in the sky
white windmills visible on the distant hillside
distant mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the tree, the group moves into a more open area with windmills visible on the distant hills. Yellow kites fly overhead against the bright blue sky. The wooden longhouse now appears on the left as the path curves, and the crowd thins out.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor crafting area with cooking fire and wicker workshop

events.description: passing villagers working with wicker reeds and a cooking fire pit

agents.ego_description: walking through the crafting area observing villagers at work

notable_agents.action: villager weaving wicker baskets at a wooden table
villager tending to a cooking fire with a large cauldron suspended over it

entered.detail: wooden tripod structure with a black cauldron hanging over a fire
work area with bundles of wicker reeds and partially completed baskets
rustic wooden workbenches where villagers are crafting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the group walking through a crafting area where villagers work with wicker and tend cooking fires. A large cauldron hangs over a fire pit, and wooden tables are set up with crafting materials. The coastal cliffs are now closer on the left as they continue along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal trail that transitions from an open natural path into a bustling festival hub. It begins with the three characters walking past wildflowers toward a distant decorated tree and a wooden longhouse under clear skies. As they progress, the open trail narrows into a dense gathering of villagers seated in circles around the base of the tree, with the group weaving through the crowd. The scene then opens up again as the path curves, shifting the longhouse to the left and revealing yellow kites flying over distant hills with windmills. Finally, the camera follows the group into a crafting area filled with wickerwork and cooking fires, moving past a large hanging cauldron as the coastal cliffs draw closer on the left.
